targets.queryText:
SELECT r.*, GROUP_CONCAT(distinct t.tag_name) as tags, s.car_model as car_model, max(g.distance_traveled) as maximum_distance_traveled
FROM recordings r
LEFT JOIN acr_tag_lookup l ON r.id = l.recording_id
LEFT JOIN acr_telemetry_tags t ON l.tag_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN statics s on r.id = s.recording_id
left join graphics g on r.id = g.recording_id
WHERE r.id = 5
GROUP BY r.id
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT r.*, GROUP_CONCAT(distinct t.tag_name) as tags, s.car_model as car_model, max(g.distance_traveled) as maximum_distance_traveled
FROM recordings r
LEFT JOIN acr_tag_lookup l ON r.id = l.recording_id
LEFT JOIN acr_telemetry_tags t ON l.tag_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN statics s on r.id = s.recording_id
left join graphics g on r.id = g.recording_id
WHERE r.id = $recording_id
GROUP BY r.id

targets.queryText: WITH step AS (SELECT MAX(1, CAST(333.0 * (1000000247704 - 1000000009366) / 1000 / 5000 AS INTEGER)) AS s), data AS (SELECT (1000000000 + time_offset) AS time, heading*57.3 AS heading, (tyre_contact_point_fl_x + tyre_contact_point_fr_x + tyre_contact_point_rl_x + tyre_contact_point_rr_x) / 40000.0 AS car_pos_x, (tyre_contact_point_fl_y + tyre_contact_point_fr_y + tyre_contact_point_rl_y + tyre_contact_point_rr_y) / 4.0 AS car_pos_y, (tyre_contact_point_fl_z + tyre_contact_point_fr_z + tyre_contact_point_rl_z + tyre_contact_point_rr_z) / 40000.0 AS car_pos_z, speed_kmh, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY time_offset) AS rn FROM physics WHERE recording_id IN (56) AND (1000000000 + time_offset) * 1000 BETWEEN 1000000009366 AND 1000000247704) SELECT time, heading, car_pos_x, car_pos_y, car_pos_z, speed_kmh FROM data, step WHERE (data.rn - 1) % step.s = 0 ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText: WITH step AS (SELECT MAX(1, CAST(333.0 * ($__to - $__from) / 1000 / 5000 AS INTEGER)) AS s), data AS (SELECT (1000000000 + time_offset) AS time, heading*57.3 AS heading, (tyre_contact_point_fl_x + tyre_contact_point_fr_x + tyre_contact_point_rl_x + tyre_contact_point_rr_x) / 40000.0 AS car_pos_x, (tyre_contact_point_fl_y + tyre_contact_point_fr_y + tyre_contact_point_rl_y + tyre_contact_point_rr_y) / 4.0 AS car_pos_y, (tyre_contact_point_fl_z + tyre_contact_point_fr_z + tyre_contact_point_rl_z + tyre_contact_point_rr_z) / 40000.0 AS car_pos_z, speed_kmh, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY time_offset) AS rn FROM physics WHERE recording_id IN ($recording_id) AND (1000000000 + time_offset) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to) SELECT time, heading, car_pos_x, car_pos_y, car_pos_z, speed_kmh FROM data, step WHERE (data.rn - 1) % step.s = 0 ORDER BY time

targets.queryText:
WITH step AS (SELECT MAX(1, CAST(333.0 * ($__to - $__from) / 1000 / 5000 AS INTEGER)) AS s), 
data AS (
  SELECT (1000000000 + p.time_offset) AS time, speed_kmh, gas, steer_angle, wheel_angular_speed_fl - wheel_angular_speed_fr AS front_angular_diff, 2*(wheel_angular_speed_fl - wheel_angular_speed_fr)/(wheel_angular_speed_fl+wheel_angular_speed_fr) as perc_front_angular_diff, -local_angular_vel_y as yaw, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.time_offset) AS rn 
  FROM physics p WHERE p.recording_id IN ($recording_id) AND (1000000000 + p.time_offset) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
  )

  SELECT time,  speed_kmh, gas, steer_angle, front_angular_diff, perc_front_angular_diff, yaw
 FROM data, step WHERE (data.rn - 1) % step.s = 0 
ORDER BY time

panels.title: yaw over wheel speed difference, braking

targets.queryText:
WITH step AS (SELECT MAX(1, CAST(333.0 * (1000000047392 - 1000000040108) / 1000 / 5000 AS INTEGER)) AS s), 
data AS (
  SELECT (1000000000 + p.time_offset) AS time, speed_kmh, gas, steer_angle, brake, slip_ratio_fl, slip_ratio_fr, slip_ratio_rl, slip_ratio_rr, ((slip_ratio_fl/slip_ratio_rl) + (slip_ratio_fr/slip_ratio_rr))/2-1 as slip_front_bias, (slip_ratio_fl/slip_ratio_rl) -1 as slip_left_bias, (slip_ratio_fr/slip_ratio_rr) -1 as slip_right_bias, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.time_offset) AS rn 
  FROM physics p WHERE p.recording_id IN (107) AND (1000000000 + p.time_offset) * 1000 BETWEEN 1000000040108 AND 1000000047392 and brake >0
  )

  SELECT time,  speed_kmh, brake, slip_ratio_fl, slip_ratio_fr, slip_ratio_rl, slip_ratio_rr, slip_front_bias, slip_left_bias, slip_right_bias
 FROM data, step WHERE (data.rn - 1) % step.s = 0 
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:

  SELECT (1000000000 + p.time_offset) AS time, speed_kmh, gas, steer_angle, brake, slip_ratio_fl, slip_ratio_fr, slip_ratio_rl, slip_ratio_rr, ((slip_ratio_fl/slip_ratio_rl) + (slip_ratio_fr/slip_ratio_rr))/2-1 as slip_front_bias, (slip_ratio_fl/slip_ratio_rl) -1 as slip_left_bias, (slip_ratio_fr/slip_ratio_rr) -1 as slip_right_bias, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p.time_offset) AS rn 
  FROM physics p WHERE p.recording_id IN ($recording_id) AND (1000000000 + p.time_offset) * 1000 BETWEEN $__from AND $__to and brake >0
  )

  SELECT time,  speed_kmh, brake, slip_ratio_fl, slip_ratio_fr, slip_ratio_rl, slip_ratio_rr, slip_front_bias, slip_left_bias, slip_right_bias
 FROM data, step WHERE (data.rn - 1) % step.s = 0 
ORDER BY time

select rate_fl, rate_fr, rate_rl, rate_rr from (SELECT
    time_offset, g_force_x, g_force_y,  g_force_z,
    
    1000*(suspension_travel_fl - LAG(suspension_travel_fl) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) / 
        (time_offset - LAG(time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS rate_fl,
       1000* (suspension_travel_fr - LAG(suspension_travel_fr) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) / 
        (time_offset - LAG(time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS rate_fr,
        1000*(suspension_travel_rl - LAG(suspension_travel_rl) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) / 
        (time_offset - LAG(time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS rate_rl,
        1000*(suspension_travel_rr - LAG(suspension_travel_rr) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) / 
        (time_offset - LAG(time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS rate_rr
FROM physics
where recording_id = 40 and speed_kmh > 10
ORDER BY recording_id and time_offset) where rate_fl between -300 and 300 aND rate_fr between -300 and 300 and rate_rl between -300 and 300 and rate_rr between -300 and 300
